chunks.text: Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation (PIII) for Integrated Circuit Manufacturing: Fourth Quarterly Progress Report (M91/116) by Nathan W. Cheung, Michael A. Lieberman, C.A. Pico, R.A. Stewart, J. Tao, M.H. Kiang, C. Yu, V. Vahedi, B. Troyanovsky, W. En, E. Jones and J. Benasso. This report details progress on PIII technology for IC manufacturing.
chunks.question: What is the focus of the fourth quarterly progress report M91/116?

chunks.text: Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation (PIII) for Integrated Circuit Manufacturing: Third Quarterly Progress Report (M91/86) by Nathan W. Cheung, Michael A. Lieberman, C.A. Pico, R.A. Stewart, J. Tao, M.H. Kiang, C. Yu, V. Vahedi, B. Troyanovsky, W. En, E. Jones and J. Benasso. This report continues the quarterly updates on PIII applications in semiconductor fabrication.
chunks.question: What does report M91/86 cover regarding PIII?

chunks.text: Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation (PIII) for Integrated Circuit Manufacturing: Second Quarterly Progress Report (M91/63) by N.W. Cheung, Michael A. Lieberman, C.A. Pico, R.A. Stewart, J. Tao, M.H. Kiang, C. Yu, V. Vahedi, B. Troyanovsky, W. En, E. Jones and J. Benasso. This is part of a series on advancing PIII techniques for integrated circuits.
chunks.question: What is the topic of the second quarterly report M91/63?
chunks.answer: Advancing PIII techniques for integrated circuits.

chunks.text: Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation (PIII) for Integrated Circuit Manufacturing (M91/26) by Michael A. Lieberman and Nathan W. Cheung. This foundational report introduces PIII methods for use in manufacturing integrated circuits.
chunks.question: What does report M91/26 introduce?
chunks.answer: PIII methods for integrated circuit manufacturing.

chunks.text: Characterization of the Processing Plasma in an Engineering Prototype Reactor for Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation (M90/100) by R.A. Stewart, X.Y. Qian, D.A. Carl, B. Lake, Jr., J. Benasso, R. Lynch, C.A. Pico, Michael A. Lieberman and Nathan W. Cheung. This study analyzes plasma properties in a prototype reactor for PIII.
chunks.question: What is characterized in report M90/100?
chunks.answer: Plasma properties in a PIII prototype reactor.

chunks.text: Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation for VLSI Fabrication (M90/84) by X.Y. Qian, Nathan W. Cheung and Michael A. Lieberman. This report explores the application of PIII technology in Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) fabrication processes.
chunks.question: What application does report M90/84 focus on?

chunks.text: Metal Vapor Vacuum Arc Ion Implantation for Seeding of Electroless Cu Plating (M90/82) by X.Y. Qian, M.H. Kiang, Nathan W. Cheung, I.G. Brown, X. Godechot, J.E. Galvin, R.A. MacGill and K.M. Yu. This research investigates ion implantation techniques to seed electrodes copper plating.
chunks.question: What technique is studied in report M90/82?
chunks.answer: Ion implantation for seeding copper plating.

chunks.text: Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation for Impurity Gettering in Silicon Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation and Dose Loss in Impurity Gettering Experiment (M90/23) by H. Wong, X.Y. Qian, D. Carl, Nathan W. Cheung, Michael A. Lieberman, I.G. Brown and K.M. Yu. This report examines PIII for impurity gettering in silicon and related dose loss experiments.
chunks.question: What is examined in report M90/23?
chunks.answer: PIII for impurity gettering in silicon.

chunks.text: BERT - Circuit Electromigration Simulator (M90/3) by B.K. Liew, P. Fang, Nathan W. Cheung and Chenming Hu. This technical report describes BERT, a simulator for circuit electromigration analysis.
chunks.question: What does report M90/3 describe?
